servinfo.title: All Latches, Hinges and Locks Inspection

servinfosub.title: Door

item.ptxt: Check that door opens and closes smoothly.
Check that front, rear and rear end doors stop in the secondary latch position properly (preventing doors from opening freely).
Check that door closes completely in full latch position.

servinfosub.ptxt: If any malfunction is found, lubricate hinges and latch, or replace door lock if necessary.

servinfosub.title: Hood

item.ptxt: Check that hood opens and closes smoothly.
Check that hood is held in secondary latch position when hood lock is released.
Check that hood closes completely in full latch position.

servinfosub.ptxt: If any malfunction is found, lubricate hinges and latch, or replace hood latch if necessary.
